title: Figma learning lab: the many ways to make with Figma Make
speakers: Alexia Danton (Designer Advocate, Figma), Brett McMillin (Designer Advocate, Figma)
key_points: Covers the different ways to build with Figma Make, including creating a new prototype from scratch or starting from an existing codebase.
Walks through guidelines and skills and how to provide great context to get good results from Figma Make.
Shares best practices for working with your design system inside Figma Make.
Format is a learning lab session, with an invitation to continue informally afterward in the Learning Lab Lounge with the Figma team.
